text: As used in this agreement, with reference to this state, the term administrator shall mean the commissioner of motor vehicles.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14
##### § 407 — Administrator defined

As used in this agreement, with reference to this state, the term administrator shall mean the commissioner of motor vehicles.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: As used in this agreement, with reference to this state, the term administrator shall mean the commissioner of motor vehicles.
